title: [USER-16] User Profile Management API
body:
## Overview
Build the user profile API so users can view and update their account details.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/user/me` | Required | Get current user's profile |
| `PATCH` | `/api/user/me` | Required | Update display name, notification preferences |
| `POST` | `/api/user/me/change-password` | Required | Change password (requires current password) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/user/me` | Required | Delete account (GDPR compliance) |

## Profile Fields
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "displayName": "GamerTag",
  "emailVerified": true,
  "steamId": "76561198...",
  "steamLinked": true,
  "notificationPreferences": {
    "emailAlerts": true,
    "slackAlertsEnabled": false
  },
  "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"
}
```

## Notification Preferences
Users can configure global defaults for how they receive alerts:
- [ ] Toggle email alerts on/off globally
- [ ] Store Slack webhook URL
- [ ] Set default alert currency (USD, EUR, GBP, CAD)

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement all CRUD endpoints above with JWT auth middleware
- [ ] Validate all input (display name length, email format for changes)
- [ ] On account deletion: anonymize data per GDPR (replace PII with hashed values, keep price history rows)
- [ ] On email change: send verification to new address before updating
- [ ] Add unit and integration tests for all endpoints

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can update their display name and notification preferences
- Account deletion removes all PII
- Password change requires current password verification
- Profile returns `steamLinked: true` when Steam account is connected (see #17)

## Dependencies
- #15 User Authentication
